title: RPG [BTW Addon]
description: Redistribute your attributes to spice up your game with your personal playstyles!
body:
# RPG Addon
This is a small addon for Better Than Wolves that adds RPG-like stat allocation on world creation. It allows the player to adapt the game to their own playstyle or just have some fun with wacky builds!

Just use the RPG button on world creation to (re-)distribute your stats!
Existing worlds and later changes are also supported, use the `/resetrpgstats` command to redistribute your stats.

### Important
**This addon keeps the game balance intact and does not have an option to increase the maximum stats!**

## Available Attributes
These are the currently available stats/attributes. All stats can be decreased/deallocated to -19 or the lowest possible value (e.g. 1 Heart, 1 Food Shank). There are no upper limits.
#### Health (Default: 5)
- Amount of hearts. Each point corresponds to 1 Heart.
#### Food Shanks (Default: 5)
- Amount of available food shanks. Each point corresponds to 1 full shank.
#### Movement (Default: 5)
- Movement speed. Each point is worth 2.5% of the base movement speed. Additive.
#### Hunger Rate (Default: 10)
- The amount of hunger/exhaustion all actions cost. Each point is worth a ~4% change. Multiplicative.
#### Block Break Speed (Default: 10)
- The speed of block breaking. Each point is worth a ~4% change. Multiplicative.

The default allocation represents the normal Minecraft/BTW experience with no changes.
